summary: Recent updates in the documentation area of Firefox involved converting the existing RST (reStructuredText) documents to Markdown format. Markdown is a simpler and more widely used markup language that makes the documentation easier to read and edit, which is beneficial for developers and contributors who want to understand or improve the browser. This change is significant because it enhances accessibility and streamlines the documentation process, facilitating better collaboration within the development community. _Users may not notice immediate changes_, but this improvement in the underlying documentation will support future features and fixes more efficiently.
